name: ProbSPARQL: Querying Knowledge Graphs with Multi-dimensional, Uncertain Numeric Data

description: arXiv:2607.18262v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The SFB 1574 Circular Factory is building a shared knowledge graph infrastructure for integrating data about returned products. A central challenge is that circular-factory data include numeric measurements that (i) originate from sensors or are derived from sensor-based measurements, (ii) are frequently multi-dimensional, and (iii) are inherently...
author: Jingcheng Wu, Ratan Bahadur Thapa, Daniel Hernandez, Hongkuan Zhou, Steffen Staab
